user.title: PlugChoice – API Key
user.description: Enter your PlugChoice Personal Access Token. You can generate one at https://app.plugchoice.com/settings/personal-access-tokens.

charger.title: PlugChoice – Select Charger
charger.description: Select the charger to monitor and the default RFID token used to authorise charging sessions.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your Personal Access Token.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the PlugChoice API. Check your internet connection.
error.no_chargers: No chargers found for this API key. Make sure your account has at least one charger configured.
